title: Supply Chain Manager - Gati - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Gati - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Gati. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Gati:
Gati is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gati!
